description: A truncated cone (frustum) with a base diameter of 40mm, a top diameter of 20mm, and a height of 30mm.
notes: Align the center of the base with the origin (0, 0, 0). This shape can be easily generated using a revolve operation of a right trapezoid about the Z-axis, or by lofting between two circular sketches of diameter 40mm and 20mm spaced 30mm apart along the Z-axis.
